'''HarperCollins Publishers''' is a major book publisher owned [[Wikipedia:News Corporation|News Corporation]]. HarperCollins published several ''[[Star Wars]]'' novels in audiobook format.

HarperCollins also published the title ''[[Star Wars: Stormtroopers: Beyond the Armor]]'' under their Harper Design imprint on [[October 24]], [[2017]].<ref name="amazonstormtroopers">{{Harper|url=products/star-wars-stormtroopers-ryder-windhamadam-bray?variant=32207273721890|text=Star Wars Stormtroopers}}</ref>
